name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
CryptoWatchr keeps an eye on the coins you care about.

• Add coins to your watchlist
• Set price and percent-change alerts
• Silence alerts during quiet hours
• Get a daily morning summary
• Check prices anytime with /price

Tap /start to open the menu — everything is a button.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
